parsing_res_list.block_content: Words that have died out in England but are still used in U.S.:
gotten fall (the season),bath and path (with a strong "a"),sick （all illness),injured mad (angry)
progress,consignment,deck Jo cards slim mean (bad),trash hog,glee,jeopardy,smolder,antagonize mayhem talented magnetic,skillet
chore maximize minimize,r ragamuffin homespun I guess maybe,quit,leaf through a book,frame up
Manyof these,however,have found their way back into "English"via America.

core_content.markdown:
# The Sharing of uni Languages 

Words that have died out in England but are still used in U.S.:

gotten fall (the season),bath and path (with a strong "a"),sick （all illness),injured mad (angry)

progress,consignment,deck Jo cards slim mean (bad),trash hog,glee,jeopardy,smolder,antagonize mayhem talented magnetic,skillet 

chore maximize minimize,r ragamuffin homespun I guess maybe,quit,leaf through a book,frame up 

Manyof these,however,have found their way back into "English"via America.
